content_fingerprint: openai reflects on parameter golf experiment as a model for ai assisted research at scale openai s community research contest which challenged over 1 000 participants to push ai assisted machine learning under strict parameter constraints has yielded findings the company says are reshaping how it thinks about efficient model design and collaborative research workflows openai published a reflection on its parameter golf initiative a public competition that gathered more than 1 000 participants and over 2 000 submissions focused on ai assisted machine learning research coding agents quantization
